description: 17 pay-per-call data tools via x402 (USDC on Base): crypto, FX, weather, WHOIS, web, token risk.
name: io.github.Marysbrain/x402-gateway-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Buyer wallet key (fund with a few USDC on Base). Optional: free previews work without it.
environmentVariables.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Refuse any single call above this price. Default 0.25; set 1.25 to enable the $1 domain dossier.
environmentVariables.name: MAX_PER_CALL_USD

environmentVariables.description: Total spend cap per session. Default 2.00.
environmentVariables.name: MAX_SESSION_USD

environmentVariables.description: Gateway base URL override. Default https://gateway.stride20k.com.
environmentVariables.name: GATEWAY_URL

title: Stride20k x402 Data Gateway
